en: If your company is required to comply with Philippines Statutory Labor Insurance, you will be asked to provide relevant documents in a subsequent form(s).
Philippines Statutory Labor Insurance Applicability Assessment

The Employees’ Compensation (EC) Program, administered by the \nEmployees’ Compensation Commission (ECC), is a government-mandated program that provides compensation benefits to employees and their dependents in cases of work-related sickness, injury, disability, or death.
Is your company required to comply with Philippines’ Employees’ Compensation (EC) Program requirement and maintain applicable documentation to show compliance?
Please select from the following reason(s) your company is exempt from compling with Philippines’ Employees’ Compensation (EC) Program requirement.
The company is a sole proprietorship with no other employees.
